scripts.test: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location (Split-Path $env:npm_package_json); if (Test-Path build-tests) { Remove-Item build-tests -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo) { Remove-Item tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo -Force }; tsc -b tsconfig.test.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test build-tests/tests"
